orchestration_engine: ELEMENTARY Autonomous Delivery Control Plane / ADCP

purpose: use direct and indirect governed capability paths
preapproved_categories: GitHub repositories issues pull requests actions artifacts and reviews
GitHub Projects V2 through governed secret-backed workflows
OpenAI Codex and ChatGPT coding surfaces when technically available and governed
Codex CLI IDE web cloud SDK GitHub Action GitHub review subagents worktrees skills plugins hooks apps and MCP within admitted scope
Windows filesystem including C:\ through governed runner paths
email calendar contacts and collaboration systems
Adobe Canva Figma and media production systems
local sandbox container and data-processing resources

capability_resolution.rule: Do not claim a capability is unavailable solely because no native connector action is visible. Check governed indirect execution paths first. For Codex, distinguish official product capability, verified ELEMENTARY integration and live runtime activation.

mandatory_capability_drift_updates.rule: Any chat or governed agent that discovers, verifies, loses or materially changes a project capability must update this canonical authorization contract or record a blocking follow-up issue if it cannot write.
triggers: new connector or tool becomes available
existing connector or tool capability is reduced or removed
new indirect governed execution path is proven
known governed execution path stops working or becomes blocked
Codex surface is connected configured activated or removed
scope of a secret-backed workflow changes
available repository, project, storage, email, calendar, browser, design or runtime resource changes
mandatory_capability_drift_updates.if_write_path_unavailable: Create or update a GitHub issue with the evidence and mark the canonical contract update as pending.

windows_terminal.path: Chat or governed dispatch -> GitHub Actions -> BoCore self-hosted runner -> WSL -> Windows interop -> PowerShell
windows_terminal.filesystem_scope: C:\ subject to the selected bounded operation and runtime permissions

github_projects_v2.path: governed GitHub workflow -> ELEMENTARY_GITHUB_PROJECTS_TOKEN -> GitHub GraphQL Projects V2

verified: current chat can use the connected GitHub application against the private ELEMENTARY repository
source-controlled Codex isolated-worktree dry-run executor exists
Codex contract workflow and tests exist
root AGENTS.md startup/governance instructions are added by the Codex startup update
not_yet_verified: Codex CLI availability and exact version on BoCore after the owner installation
live Codex worktree execution through BoCore
codex_project_integration.authority: Codex is a bounded worker under ADCP and Agent Governance, not a separate control plane.

required_controls: use the least destructive effective path
use rollback or recovery where applicable
respect explicit owner and system constraints
do not read or copy Codex authentication files
do not infer runtime activation from product availability
